description: A perfect addition to your daily wardrobe, this sandal from catwalk is crafted from durable material in a fashionable cut to offer exemplary comfort without compromising on style. Upper Synthetic leather straps on the forefoot with a braided strap connecting it to the heel strap Heel strap to lock the foot in place A midfoot length strap connecting the forefoot straps and heel cup Padded footbed for all-day comfort Outsole TPU outsole with an upraised heel and patterned grooves and lugs Sandal care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
